item.title:
Fitzwilliam__: Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 6h Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen
Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 8h The moment
item.description:
Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 6h Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen
Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 8h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the finish and huge money raised. What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 2 1 41 3 mil

item.title: JohnnyDineen: Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 6h En respuesta a @Fitzwilliam__ Thanks lads 4 4 768
item.description: Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 6h En respuesta a @Fitzwilliam__ Thanks lads 4 4 768

item.title: JohnnyDineen: Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 15h All the top athletes have little siestas before their big sporting events. Ronaldo app
item.description:
Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 15h All the top athletes have little siestas before their big sporting events. Ronaldo apparently takes 6 naps a day so I’ve a bit to go to catch him up !! Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 15h Update: @ JOHNNY DINEEN COUCH TO 5K
@JohnnyDineen preparing for tonight’s 5K. Only six and a half hours to go. Plenty of content to follow from the race. 39 15 732 105 mil

item.title: DanBarberTF: Daniel Barber @DanBarberTF · 10h En respuesta a @JohnnyDineen y @DylanBraith92 Noisy in prelims 2 308
item.description: Daniel Barber @DanBarberTF · 10h En respuesta a @JohnnyDineen y @DylanBraith92 Noisy in prelims 2 308

item.title: JohnnyDineen: Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 6h En respuesta a @DanBarberTF y @DylanBraith92 And carrying a bit of condition Dan 1 1
item.description: Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 6h En respuesta a @DanBarberTF y @DylanBraith92 And carrying a bit of condition Dan 1 151

item.title: TheIrishField: The Irish Field @TheIrishField · 6h Success was sweeter than ever on the second and final day of the Craven Breeze Up Sa
item.description: The Irish Field @TheIrishField · 6h Success was sweeter than ever on the second and final day of the Craven Breeze Up Sale, but unfortunately luck seemed to be in short supply for vendors theirishfield.ie NEWS: Egmont achieve career best despite Craven challenges The market remained patchy on the second and final day of the Tattersalls Craven Breeze Up Sale, Amy Lynam reports from Newmarket 1 1 1 499

item.title: Drakesport: Barry Drake @Drakesport · 8h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the f
item.description: Barry Drake @Drakesport · 8h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the finish and huge money raised. What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 79 46 916 79 mil
